member.name: T:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.PaymentsController
member.summary: Exposes /api/v1/payments endpoints for processing payments, retrieving payment records, refunds, and status updates.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.PaymentsController.Process(QuickBite.Payment.Application.DTOs.ProcessPaymentRequestDto)
member.summary: Process payment for an order (COD, CARD, UPI, or WALLET).

member.name: M:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.PaymentsController.GetByOrder(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get payment record for a specific order.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.PaymentsController.GetByCustomer(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get all payments for a customer.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.PaymentsController.Refund(System.Guid,QuickBite.Payment.Application.DTOs.RefundRequestDto)
member.summary: Refund a PAID payment (wallet credit or gateway reversal).

member.name: M:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.PaymentsController.UpdateStatus(System.Guid,QuickBite.Payment.Application.DTOs.UpdatePaymentStatusRequestDto)
member.summary: Update payment status (PENDING, PAID, FAILED, REFUNDED).

member.name: T:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.WalletController
member.summary: Exposes /api/v1/wallet endpoints for balance retrieval, top-ups, paying for orders from the wallet, and statement retrieval.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Payment.API.Controllers.WalletController.PayFromWallet(QuickBite.Payment.Application.DTOs.PayFromWalletRequestDto)
member.summary: pay for an order from the wallet balance.
